plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: AniSeekr uses your location to surface nearby anime pilgrimage spots.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: AniSeekr uses your location to surface nearby anime pilgrimage spots.

plugins.photosPermission: AniSeekr needs access to your photos so you can pick a profile picture.

plugins.cameraPermission: AniSeekr uses the camera so you can frame and capture a pilgrimage scene next to its anime reference.

plugins.photosPermission: AniSeekr saves pilgrimage comparison photos to your library so you can share them later.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: AniSeekr saves pilgrimage comparison photos to your library so you can share them later.

plugins.motionPermission: AniSeekr uses the compass to help you match your shot to the original anime scene direction.

plugins.faceIDPermission: AniSeekr uses Face ID to confirm before showing adult content.

infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: AniSeekr uses your location to surface nearby anime pilgrimage spots.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: AniSeekr needs access to your photos so you can pick a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: AniSeekr saves pilgrimage comparison photos to your library so you can share them later.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: AniSeekr uses the camera so you can frame and capture a pilgrimage scene next to its anime reference.
infoPlist.NSMotionUsageDescription: AniSeekr uses the compass to help you match your shot to the original anime scene direction.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: AniSeekr uses Face ID to confirm before showing adult content.
